_fixture_note: DEMO RECOVERY-PROBE FIXTURE (issue #57). Copy of banking_adaptive_tool_use_0001 with a wrong_entity recovery_probe added. NOT part of the evaluated corpus — lives in tests/fixtures, never in data/scenarios. Demonstrates the probe MECHANISM only.

persona.name: Margaret Chen
persona.background: Runs a catering business for 20 years. Has both personal and business accounts at the bank. Not very tech-savvy but knows exactly what she wants.

user_goals: Check the current balance of her business checking account
Review the last 5 transactions on the business account for any she doesn't recognize
Transfer $2,500 from business savings to business checking to cover upcoming payroll
Set up a recurring weekly transfer of $500 from checking to savings starting next Monday
Ask about the current interest rate on business savings accounts
Report a suspicious $47.99 charge from 'DIGITAL_SVC_LLC' she doesn't recognize

tools.name: verify_customer_identity
tools.description: Verify customer identity using account number, SSN last 4, or security questions

tools.name: get_account_balance
tools.description: Get current balance for a specific account

tools.name: get_transaction_history
tools.description: Retrieve transaction history for an account

tools.name: setup_recurring_transfer
tools.description: Set up a recurring automatic transfer

tools.name: report_suspicious_transaction
tools.description: Flag a transaction as potentially fraudulent

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: Why the customer believes it's suspicious

initial_message: Hello, I need to check on my business account. There are several things I need to take care of today and I don't have a lot of time.

expected_state_changes.goal: Transfer $2,500 from business savings to business checking to cover upcoming payroll
Transfer $2,500 from business savings to business checking to cover upcoming payroll

recovery_probe.injection: Wait, actually for that $2,500 payroll transfer, send it into account BUS-CHK-999 instead of my usual checking.
